titleStmt.title: SII 22.21: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 21. (A.R. No. 21 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUKKAḌAIYŪR. AMṚITAGHAṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE EAST BASE OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE. RĀJAK. RĀJARĀJA I—23rd YEAR (A.D. 1007-8)

summary.p: The inscription commences with the introduction Tirumagaḷpōla etc. It records a sale of land made tax-free by the mahāsabhā of Tirukkaḍavūr in Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu for 15 kāśu received by them from the temple of Kālakāladēva. This amount seems to have been a gift (from the palace ?) for burning a lamp called “Mummuḍiśōḻaṉ” (evidently after the king's title) in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī .... tirumakaḷpolap perunilaccelviyum taṉakke yurimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kānta
ḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭum kaṅkapāṭiyum nuḷampapāṭiyum taṭikaipāṭiyum kuṭamalaināṭum kollamum kaliṅkamum
Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamum Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻaraiyilakkamum tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa taṉṉeḻil vaḷar Ūḻiyuḷellā yāṇṭum toḻute
ḻaviḷaṅku yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrī korājarājarājakesari panmarāṉa śrī rājarāja devaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 3Āvatu Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭu Ampar
ṉāṭṭu paṭa tirukkaṭavūr mahāsabhaip perumakkaḷom Uṭaiyār śrīkāla kāladevar paṇṭārattilk kācu 10 5 kācu koṇṭu Ikkācu patiṉaiñcuṉukkum
viḷakkoṉṟu candrādittavallerikka tiruviḷakkuppuṟamāka viṟṟuk kuṭutta ṉilam Aḷaṉāṭaṉ vākkānkaraiy kiḻttalaippattu ṉilam nivaṉtam I
ruttu ṉilattukkum sabhaiyome yiṟaiyiṟukka viṟṟukkuṭuttom mahā sabhaip perumakkaḷom Ivviḷakku mummuṭicoḻaṉ .
Digital edition of SII 22.21 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
